name: Cream of Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds chicken breasts without skin, boned and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large saucepan.
2. Add chicken and celery, and sauté until tender.
3. Sprinkle flour over the chicken and celery; stir to mix well.
4. Pour chicken broth and water into the saucepan slowly, stirring constantly.
5. Add mushrooms, onion powder, thyme leaves, white pepper, and remaining ingredients except milk.
6. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes.
7. Stir in milk and continue simmering until heated through.
8. Makes 6 servings, about 1 cup each.
